raw_consumer_statement: I placed an order for this item on XX/XX/XXXX, for a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. It arrived with discoloration within the coins holder and I reached out to the merchant about it for a return attempt. The merchant sympathizes with me first but unfortunately, the merchant claims that the item I received was in good condition, even though it wasnt. I attempted to file a dispute with my card issuer, and they sided with the merchant, citing customer abuse and item was in good condition. I attempted to reopen the dispute, but to my dismay, the card issuer denied it.
